03 — Contact

Contact — Todd Libby

3

Get in touch

Have a question, or just want to talk about stuff? I'm reachable in a few places.

The best way to reach me is via Bluesky. I try to respond within a day or two. If it's about an accessibility audit, I no longer do those. A speaking engagement? Maybe. A position with a company? If the fit is right. A freelance project, the more detail you can include the better.

"I can still do what I do with the confidence of someone who has done it for a long time."

I'm not currently taking on new long-term client projects, but I'm open to short engagements and consulting work.

Bluesky

@toddl.dev

GitHub

colabottles

Twitch

toddcodes

Response time

1-2 days

Usually faster on Bluesky.

Open to

Full-time frontend or back end work Consulting Speaking Short projects

Not open to

Long-term retainers Cold sales pitches Accessibility audits Unpaid work PDF Remediation

Timezone

MST / UTC−7

Phoenix, Arizona. No DST.
